author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic relation assertion-status cleanup following the static/officeholder/claim/ridership/funding checkpoint. No external/provider-backed LLM commands, ingest/write/ask/schema commands, identity-review-run, ontology-normalize-run, provider profiles, or hand edits to canonical JSONL were used.

read_only_subagents.result_used: Observed workforce metrics with entity subjects, workforce unit family, allowed normalized workforce units, concrete values, and observed period anchors can be marked delivered while holding estimates, variances, weak anchors, non-entity subjects, and missing evidence.
Source submitted_by relations should not treat the month token May in source titles as modal uncertainty; temporal guards now use relation-owned text and evidence only.

Relation-owned procurement proposal text can classify a narrow set of entity-to-entity award/vendor relations as proposed while holding approval requests, ratification, wrong kinds, and endpoint-description contamination.
Read-only recommendation captured for a future entity/source implementation timeline rule; not implemented in this slice.

assertion_qualifiers: Added observed elevator/escalator availability metric delivered inference for exact equipment availability metric names with percentage units, concrete values, observed anchors, and future/proposal vetoes.

Added observed workforce metric delivered inference for entity subjects with workforce unit family, normalized units employees/positions/full_time_equivalents/headcount, concrete values, observed anchors including compact quarter/month-year labels, and estimate/variance/proposal/budget guards.
Adjusted source submitted_by inference to use relation/evidence text for temporal guards so source titles such as May 2025 do not trigger modal uncertainty.
Added proposed status inference for narrow relation-owned procurement proposal funding-award text.
tests: Added equipment availability positive and negative assertion qualifier tests.
Added workforce metric positive and negative assertion qualifier tests.
Added source submitted_by May-title positive and future-text negative tests.
Added proposed procurement funding positive and negative tests.
